summary: Frontend testing on preview URL (biqc-hardened.preview.emergentagent.com) validating Soundboard UX, calibration/onboarding flow, signup flow, and session persistence. All major issues from previous iteration (121) appear to be RESOLVED in this environment.

findings: Mode toggle present with 'Normal (GPT-5.3)' and 'BIQc Trinity' buttons
Normal mode button shows as active (orange background)
Trinity mode shows as locked/grayed (cursor: not-allowed, color: gray)
'Pro/Enterprise only' upgrade link badge visible next to Trinity
Input field present with placeholder 'Share what's on your mind...'
Send button present and clickable
No API key prompt visible
Quick prompts available: 'What should I focus on?', 'Summarise my risks', etc.
AI responds with 'Thinking...' indicator when message sent
Trinity button styled with cursor: not-allowed and gray color for non-Pro users
Clicking Trinity does NOT activate it for non-Pro users
Upgrade link shows 'Pro/Enterprise only' text
Registration form works with all required fields
No cognitive_profiles RLS error detected in console
Signup redirects properly to /calibration
User name personalization works (shows 'Welcome to BIQc, Test.')
Ignition animation plays and auto-advances
Welcome screen shows 4 intelligence categories
'Begin Business Intelligence Scan' button works
Website URL input field present and accepts input
'Begin Strategic Audit' button triggers scan
'I Don't Have a Website' fallback option available
Tutorial overlay appears (Step 1 of 2) - teaches users about calibration
Flow progresses properly - NOT stuck indefinitely
Session maintained on /soundboard navigation
Session maintained on /market navigation
Session maintained on /advisor navigation
Session maintained on /profile navigation
No session drops during page navigation (FIXED from iteration 121)

minor.issue: Console warning: '[CALIBRATION ROUTING] Fetch failed: Failed to fetch → fail-open to READY'

comparison_to_iteration_121.session_persistence: FIXED - Previously reported as CRITICAL, now working
comparison_to_iteration_121.cognitive_profiles_rls: NOT REPRODUCED - No RLS errors detected during signup
comparison_to_iteration_121.calibration_stuck: NOT REPRODUCED - Flow progresses properly with tutorial guidance

action_items: NONE - All reported issues from iteration 121 appear resolved in preview environment

success_rate.frontend: 100% - all tested features working as expected

context_for_next_testing_agent: Preview environment (biqc-hardened.preview.emergentagent.com) is stable. Session persistence fixed. Soundboard mode toggle works correctly with Trinity locked for non-Pro users. Signup and calibration flows work without RLS errors. Tutorial overlay may require 'Learn later' click during automated testing.
